2026-06-01.title: Write down three ways God has been faithful to you this year.
2026-06-01.question: What evidence of God's faithfulness can you clearly see when you look back?

2026-06-02.title: Read a chapter from Proverbs and identify one piece of wisdom to practice today.
2026-06-02.question: How can you actively trust God instead of relying on your own understanding?

2026-06-03.title: Pray specifically for someone you normally would not think to pray for.
2026-06-03.question: How did praying for someone else change your perspective?

2026-06-04.title: Spend ten minutes in silence, focusing only on listening to God.
2026-06-04.question: What thoughts or truths stood out during your quiet time?

2026-06-05.title: Read about a biblical figure who faced fear and overcame it through faith.
2026-06-05.question: What fear can you surrender to God today?

2026-06-06.title: Perform an act of kindness anonymously.
2026-06-06.question: How did serving without recognition affect your attitude?

2026-06-07.title: Create a prayer list for the upcoming week.
2026-06-07.question: What concerns can you intentionally bring before God instead of carrying alone?

2026-06-08.title: Read a miracle performed by Jesus and reflect on His compassion.
2026-06-08.question: What does this story teach you about Jesus' heart toward people?

2026-06-09.title: Listen to a worship song and study the Scripture it references.
2026-06-09.question: How did understanding the biblical foundation deepen the song's meaning?

2026-06-10.title: Identify one distraction that regularly pulls you away from God and limit it today.
2026-06-10.question: What changed when you removed that distraction?

2026-06-11.title: Write a short prayer of praise focusing only on God's attributes.
2026-06-11.question: Which attribute of God brings you the most comfort right now?

2026-06-12.title: Study a fruit of the Spirit and intentionally practice it throughout the day.
2026-06-12.question: Which situations gave you opportunities to demonstrate this fruit?

2026-06-13.title: Read a chapter from the Gospels and note every action Jesus takes.
2026-06-13.question: Which action of Jesus would you like to imitate more closely?

2026-06-14.title: Reach out to someone you have not spoken to in a while and encourage them.
2026-06-14.question: How did the conversation impact both you and the other person?

2026-06-15.title: Read a Psalm aloud and focus on the emotions expressed within it.
2026-06-15.question: Which emotion in the Psalm do you relate to most today?

2026-06-16.title: Choose a Bible promise and write it somewhere you'll see throughout the day.
2026-06-16.question: How did remembering God's promise influence your mindset?

2026-06-17.title: Study one of Jesus' questions from the Gospels.
2026-06-17.question: How would you personally answer Jesus' question today?

2026-06-18.title: Write a letter to God expressing your current hopes and concerns.
2026-06-18.question: What did you discover by putting your thoughts into words?

2026-06-19.title: Read about a missionary journey in Acts.
2026-06-19.question: How can you share your faith within your own community?

2026-06-20.title: Fast from one comfort or convenience for part of the day.
2026-06-20.question: What did the experience teach you about dependence on God?

2026-06-21.title: Reflect on a challenge you've overcome with God's help.
2026-06-21.question: How has God sustained you through difficult seasons?

2026-06-22.title: Read a chapter from an Old Testament prophet.
2026-06-22.question: What message from the prophet feels especially relevant today?

2026-06-23.title: Pray through the Lord's Prayer one phrase at a time.
2026-06-23.question: Which part of the prayer stood out to you the most?

2026-06-24.title: Look for an opportunity to serve someone in a practical way.
2026-06-24.question: How did serving affect your view of others?

2026-06-25.title: Read a chapter about God's creation and spend time appreciating it.
2026-06-25.question: What part of creation most reminds you of God's power?

2026-06-26.title: Make a list of prayers God has already answered.
2026-06-26.question: How does remembering answered prayers strengthen your faith?

2026-06-27.title: Study a biblical character's failure and restoration.
2026-06-27.question: What does their story teach you about God's grace?

2026-06-28.title: Spend fifteen minutes thanking God without asking for anything.
2026-06-28.question: What were you most grateful for during this time?

2026-06-29.title: Read a chapter from one of Paul's letters and identify a command to follow.
2026-06-29.question: How can you put that instruction into practice this week?

2026-06-30.title: Review your month and write down the biggest spiritual lesson you learned.
2026-06-30.question: How have you seen God working in your life throughout the month?
